have h₁ : V(G, M) ⊆ V(G, symmDiff M P.edgeSet) := by
    intro v hv
    -- Case 1: v ∉ V(P)
    by_cases h₂ : v ∈ V(P)

      have h₃ : v ∈ V(G, symmDiff M P.edgeSet) := by
        -- Since P is an augmenting path, v cannot be an endpoint
        have h₄ : P.Nonempty := h.nonempty
        have h₅ : v ≠ P.first := by
          intro h₅
          have h₆ : v ∉ V(G, M) := by
            have h₇ : v = P.first := h₅
            have h₈ : P.first ∉ V(G, M) := h.first_not_in
            simpa [h₇] using h₈
          exact h₆ hv
        have h₆ : v ≠ P.last := by
          intro h₆
          have h₇ : v ∉ V(G, M) := by
            have h₈ : v = P.last := h₆
            have h₉ : P.last ∉ V(G, M) := h.last_not_in
